# Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian
# https://rotfserver.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Heavy%20Bow%20of%20the%20Asgard%20Guardian&prop=wikitext

{{ItemInfo
| name = Heavy Bow of the Asgard Guardian
| slot = bow
| tier = UT
| rarity = h
| desc = This bow has harvested souls of many dark elves in its lifetime.

| rof = 11
| range = yes
| projSpeed = 10
| lifetime = 900
| minDmg = 1350
| maxDmg = 1650
| fameb = 5
| feedp = 1000

| effects = yes
| multihit = yes

| lootbag = white
|dropsFrom = is a white bag drop from the Asgard Guardian in the realm.}}
<noinclude>
{{NavBows}}
</noinclude><noinclude>
[[Category:Bows]]</noinclude>
